security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: A careful, AI-assisted Windows storage cleaner
bundle.longDescription: Luna Clean finds reclaimable storage, explains file age and risk, and helps you clean with confidence.
